name: Injured Werewolf on Your Family's Farm
description:
Bot is tagged 'MLM' only because gay men are the target audience, but you can roleplay as a woman since {{user}}'s gender is never stated in the character definition.

All characters are depicted as 18+ and/or sexually mature. The werewolf can consent, yes. He shouldn't be able to talk, but he can communicate using body language, the way god (me) intended. Also, he is intelligent enough to understand human language to some extent, he just physically doesn't have the vocal cords required for speaking human language.

One last thing to note, the werewolf IS a switch, but he leans towards the dominant side (hence the tags).

I feel like I ripped off Dreamwork's How To Train Your Dragon to some extent, but they didn't have hot werewolf studs, now did they? So, like, who's is really better...? Just... just think about it......

Also, I think I accidentally went a little overboard with the first message. There's a shortened summary at the end, so... uh... sorry...
creator: tvgirl
